prompt: What was my recovery score last night?
How did I sleep last night?
Show me my workouts from this week.
What's on my calendar today?
List my Todoist tasks for today.
notes: Filter preferred but list also acceptable.

prompt: Show overdue tasks.
Search my Notion for the Q2 plan.
Search my email for the Stripe invoice.
DM alice on slack and say I'm running late.
Mark the 'ship landing page' task as done.
Add a task to buy groceries tomorrow.
Create a 30-min meeting with bob@acme.com on Friday at 2pm.
Find me a free hour this week for a focus block.
Read the #product channel.
Who do I have on my Slack workspace named 'marco'?
Delete tomorrow's 3pm meeting with Sarah.
notes: List first to find event id, then delete — either acceptable as first call.

prompt: What's my resting heart rate lately?
notes: RHR lives in recovery data (and strain cycles include avg HR). Either defensible.

prompt: What's my day strain been this week?
notes: Day strain is on cycle, not workout.

prompt: List my Notion databases.
Draft an email to the team about Friday demo.
Email ravi@foo.com the spec now.
Reopen the 'renew passport' task.
List all my Gmail labels.
Add a new Gmail label called 'Investors'.
Show my Todoist projects.
How tall am I, according to WHOOP?
Upload /tmp/screenshot.png to #design on slack.
Create a Notion page called 'Weekly review' under my Journal page.
Update the 'Roadmap' Notion page with today's status.
notes: Accept search first (to find page), then update.

prompt: Comment 'blocked on auth' on the 'Ship login flow' task.
Email bob@acme.com summarizing tomorrow's meetings.
notes: Must look up calendar first, then email. First call = calendar.

prompt: Set a Todoist reminder 1 hour before my next meeting.
notes: Need to know next meeting time first.

prompt: Slack #team my recovery score from last night.
Reply to the latest email from Tom saying yes, and put it on my calendar.
What did I do yesterday?
notes: Genuinely ambiguous — calendar most common read. Judge scores intent+justification.

prompt: Catch me up.
notes: No clear source. All three defensible.

prompt: Show me what's in my inbox.
notes: Inbox could mean Gmail or Todoist. Gmail more common.

prompt: Remind me to call mom.
notes: Reminder — task or calendar. Task more natural.

prompt: Cancel my next thing.
What's 2 + 2?
Explain what HRV means.
Write me a haiku about Mondays.
Who is the CEO of Anthropic?
Show me my Apple Health steps.
notes: Apple Health not in tool set. Correct = refuse / NONE. Don't hallucinate whoop.

prompt: Post to my Twitter.
notes: Twitter/X not available. Don't fall back to Slack.

prompt: What did #product say in Slack last Tuesday before lunch?
notes: Time-window filtering — trust the model to pick read_channel or search.

prompt: Show tasks labeled @urgent in project Work.
notes: Filter query '@urgent & #Work' is the elegant answer. List with 2 params acceptable.

prompt: WHOOP sleep for the past 14 days.
notes: Must pass correct date range (today - 14, today).

prompt: Read the last 200 messages in #oncall.
Email with subject 'Invoice' from stripe.com in the last month.
notes: Must use gmail query operators (subject:Invoice from:stripe.com after:...).
